title: Scripts
wikitext:
[]: Scripts?             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Fri Apr 05, 2013 12:04 pm Are there scripts for the first two Rebuild films available anywhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Apr 05, 2013 7:19 pm Translated or original ones? The Japanese ones are included in the BDs/DVDs, I think that there were screenshots floating around on the internet, but unfortunately I have no idea about English translated scripts.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Fri Apr 05, 2013 9:56 pm English translated ones are what I meant.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 07, 2013 7:18 pm The Killer of Heroes wrote: English translated ones are what I meant.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Sun Apr 07, 2013 7:49 pm There aren't even online ones like what exists for Q and the main series?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 07, 2013 8:25 pm The Killer of Heroes wrote: There aren't even online ones like what exists for Q and the main series?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 08, 2013 6:57 pm Uploaded these awhile ago: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13255/Eva-111-and-222-Japanese-Scripts/

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Wed Apr 10, 2013 9:29 pm Reichu wrote: You're talking about dialogue transcriptions, then. No, I don't think the first two movies were ever formatted into transcripts. You can find subtitle files for them at best.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 10, 2013 9:38 pm K40s wrote: What's exactly the difference between a "script" and "dialogue tran script ions"

Article: Scripts
[]: Scripts?             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Fri Apr 05, 2013 12:04 pm Are there scripts for the first two Rebuild films available anywhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Apr 05, 2013 7:19 pm Translated or original ones? The Japanese ones are included in the BDs/DVDs, I think that there were screenshots floating around on the internet, but unfortunately I have no idea about English translated scripts.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Fri Apr 05, 2013 9:56 pm English translated ones are what I meant.
